name: Chicken Salad Picante
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Tomatoes, cut into 8 wedges each
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together salad dressing, picante sauce, and 1/4 teaspoon of chili powder; set aside.
2. Mix the remaining 1/4 teaspoon of chili powder with the salt and sprinkle the mixture over the chicken.
3. Heat oil to a medium-high temperature in a fry pan. Add chicken and cook, turning occasionally, about 8 minutes or until brown and fork tender.
4. Remove the chicken to a cutting board and cut horizontally into 1/2-inch slices.
5. Place one-fourth of the lettuce on each of four serving plates. Arrange one sliced chicken breast half over the lettuce on each plate.
6. Place avocado, onion, and tomatoes around the chicken. Drizzle 2 tablespoons of dressing over each salad. Sprinkle salad with cilantro or parsley, if desired.
